title: What Should An AI Device Look Like? — With Alex Himel
summary: Alex Himel, Meta's VP of Wearables, discusses how AI-powered glasses could become the next major computing platform. The conversation covers potential use cases for AI assistants in daily tasks and real-world context, competitive dynamics with OpenAI, Google, Apple, and Amazon, and technical considerations like on-device AI and facial recognition privacy.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz interviews Alex Himel, Meta's VP of Wearables, on the case for AI-powered glasses as the next major computing platform. The discussion lays out potential use cases for AI assistants in daily tasks and real-world context, and the competitive field against OpenAI, Google, Apple, and Amazon. It also addresses technical and policy questions, including on-device AI and the privacy implications of facial recognition.
